name: Lightning McQueen Bathroom Mirror Selfie
description: Woman with bangs and berry lipstick taking bathroom mirror selfie in cropped white Cars t-shirt, flash photography with lens flare
input_prompt: woman bathroom mirror selfie flash cropped cars tshirt bangs berry lipstick

subject.description: young female with fair skin, dark brunette hair with full straight bangs covering forehead

skin.texture: natural, slight sheen from flash, not airbrushed

hair.style: long dark hair falling over shoulders, straight with slight wave, full straight bangs covering forehead, slightly messy texture

face.expression: neutral to slight pout, gazing towards side (not at lens)
face.makeup: heavy black winged eyeliner, defined eyebrows, dark matte berry-colored lipstick
face.details: orientation: head turned slightly to right, tilted slightly down

body.details: build: curvy, prominent bust, soft skin texture; markings: black line-art tattoos on right outer forearm (outline stars/sparkles)

clothing.fit: material stretches tightly across chest creating tension wrinkles and distortion of graphic
clothing.details: graphic: large centered graphic print of Lightning McQueen (red cartoon race car) from Cars movie; state: sleeves short and tight, hemline visibly rolled/cropped
visibility: only waistband visible at bottom edge

accessories: gold ring on left ring finger

pose_action.dynamic_elements: arm_left: raised to chest height, elbow bent acute angle, hand holding smartphone facing mirror; arm_right: hanging loosely by side, slightly away from body, elbow soft; torso: angled slightly to right, slight pelvic tilt indicated by waistline; spine: natural standing curvature, slight slouch in shoulders

background: grey door frame visible on left

lighting.ambient: cool artificial bathroom light, somewhat dim
lighting.artifacts: significant lens flare/bloom from flash starburst, slight haze, flash glare washout on hand and phone
lighting.type: bright smartphone camera flash reflected in mirror
effects: harsh highlight flare obscuring phone case, creating hard shadows behind subject

camera_technical.quality: texture: slight digital noise, soft focus, average resolution, imperfections: flash glare washout on hand and phone
camera_technical.composition: medium shot, cut off at mid-thigh/waist, subject centered but asymmetrical due to arm position

realism_anchors: graphic print distortion on stretched fabric

gpt-image-1.5.prompt: A young woman takes a bathroom mirror selfie with bright smartphone flash. She has fair skin, dark brunette hair with full straight bangs covering her forehead, slightly messy texture. Her makeup features heavy black winged eyeliner, defined eyebrows, and dark matte berry-colored lipstick. Her expression is neutral with a slight pout, gazing to the side with her head turned slightly right. She has a curvy build and black line-art star tattoos on her right outer forearm. She wears a tight-fitting white cropped baby t-shirt with a large centered Lightning McQueen graphic print from Cars movie, the material stretching tightly across her chest creating tension wrinkles and distortion of the graphic. Leopard print pants with only waistband visible. Small gold hoop earrings and a gold ring. Her left arm is raised holding the phone, right arm hanging loosely by her side. The bathroom has white tiled walls with grey decorative border tiles and a grey door frame. The bright flash creates harsh highlight flare obscuring the phone, significant lens flare bloom starburst, and slight haze with flash washout on her hand. Slight digital noise and soft focus give an amateur snapshot aesthetic. No watermark. No artificial smoothing. Realistic texture.
gpt-image-1.5.notes: Natural language paragraphs, explicit preservation constraints, no quality tags

seedream-4.5.prompt: Young woman with dark brunette hair and full straight bangs taking bathroom mirror selfie with flash, heavy winged eyeliner and berry lipstick, curvy build with star tattoos on forearm, wearing tight white cropped t-shirt with Lightning McQueen Cars graphic stretched across chest, leopard print pants waistband visible, gold hoop earrings, white tiled bathroom background, harsh smartphone flash creating bright lens flare bloom and hard shadows, digital noise soft focus amateur snapshot aesthetic, not airbrushed or professional
seedream-4.5.notes: Coherent natural language, subject first, concise photography terms, inline style negation

flux-kontext-max.prompt: Young woman taking bathroom mirror selfie with bright flash. Dark brunette hair with full straight bangs covering forehead, heavy black winged eyeliner, dark berry lipstick, curvy build. Wearing tight white cropped t-shirt with Lightning McQueen Cars graphic print stretched across chest, material showing tension wrinkles. Black line-art star tattoos on right forearm. Small gold hoop earrings, gold ring. Left arm raised holding phone, right arm loose at side. Bathroom interior with white tiles and grey border, grey door frame visible. Harsh smartphone flash creates lens flare bloom, starburst effect, hard shadows behind subject. Slight digital noise and soft focus for amateur snapshot aesthetic.
flux-kontext-max.editing_prompt: Change the berry lipstick to red while keeping the bangs, winged eyeliner, and Lightning McQueen t-shirt the same. Preserve the flash photography effect and bathroom background.
flux-kontext-max.notes: Natural language with preservation clauses for editing mode, 512 token limit

playbook_principles_applied: 1_hierarchical_specificity: Detailed graphic tee (Lightning McQueen, Cars movie), specific makeup (winged eyeliner, berry lipstick), tattoo description
2_realism_anchors: 'flash lens flare', 'digital noise', 'graphic distortion on stretched fabric', 'tattoo line-art'
4_negative_hygiene: prevents professional lighting, airbrushed skin, illustration
5_spatial_consistency: precise pose with arm positions and body angle
6_lighting_storytelling: 'harsh smartphone flash' = casual amateur snapshot mood
7_imperfection_detail: specific flash artifacts (flare, bloom, washout) add authenticity
